/usr/bin/c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--enable-auto-import   -m64    CMakeFiles/OpenCLTemplate.dir/src/OpenCLTemplate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenCLTemplate.dir/src/OpenCLTemplateMain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenCLTemplate.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o -o /cygdrive/c/Users/root/source/repos/OpenCLTemplate2.9/bin/x86_64/Release/OpenCLTemplate.exe -Wl,--out-implib,/cygdrive/c/Users/root/source/repos/OpenCLTemplate2.9/bin/x86_64/Release/libOpenCLTemplate.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  /cygdrive/c/Users/root/source/repos/OpenCLTemplate2.9/OPENCL_LIBRARIES-NOTFOUND -lrt
